name: umtx2-ps5
description: PS5 UMTX2 Jailbreak with automated testing

scripts.test:js-syntax: find document/en/ps5 -name '*.js' -type f | while read file; do echo "Checking: $file" && node --check "$file"; done
scripts.test:metadata: python3 -c "import json, sys, os; from pathlib import Path; [json.load(open(f)) for f in Path('document/en/ps5/payloads').rglob('metadata.json')] or print('All metadata.json files are valid')"
scripts.test:payloads: python3 -c "from .github.scripts.run_tests import test_payload_structure, test_metadata_format; test_payload_structure(); test_metadata_format(); print('Payload tests passed!')"
